model_comparisons.selection_reason: Selects the most crowded allowed narrative as a proxy for surface consensus.
Ablation that selects the strongest evidence score without mechanism or contradiction terms.
Ablation that reranks without contradiction resistance or unsupported-claim penalty.
Ablation that selects the strongest evidence score weighted by allowed source quality.
Selects the highest deterministic narrative score after replay filtering.

validation.note: Future validation is stored separately from event-time replay evidence and must not be visible to generation or ranking steps.

rows.expected_observable: The stock underperforms a peer basket after the event.
rows.label: partial
rows.what_happened: Synthetic replay: ORION continued to underperform the peer basket, but estimate revisions were not yet broad enough for a full validation label.

rows.expected_observable: Analysts reduce forward revenue or subscriber estimates within 30 days.
rows.label: validated
rows.what_happened: Synthetic replay: forward demand slowdown became the validated narrative as estimate cuts and follow-up commentary centered on net additions and churn.

rows.expected_observable: Future company commentary focuses on acquisition efficiency or churn.
rows.label: pending
rows.what_happened: Synthetic replay: left pending to show that not every validation window should be force-labeled.

rows.expected_observable: The stock underperforms cybersecurity peers over the next 20 trading days.
rows.label: partial
rows.what_happened: Synthetic replay: LYRA continued to underperform cybersecurity peers, but the cause was not yet fully separable from broader sector weakness.

rows.expected_observable: Analysts cut net retention or billings quality assumptions within 30 days.
rows.label: validated
